{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316012651E26BDBBAAC515F04CC"}"},"total":94},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7380866062441906968","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对味了，以前看同人总想着主线剧情主线剧情。但是对于全职猎人的庞大奇幻背景来说，乱花这样的才有猎人味！全职猎人的魅力也正在于此处呀！无穷尽的冒险和无数欢乐的小伙伴！快乐最大化了呀！","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":25,"text":"全职猎人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%A8%E8%81%8C%E7%8C%8E%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774252886515F04CC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227380866062441906968%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227321677937944579134%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%A8%E8%81%8C%E7%8C%8E%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718496100,"group_id":"7321677937944579134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"非是不肯，只是年少时铸成的一颗自尊心锤不碎磨不圆，冰冷又顽固","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Ctwzkpzvbsqx/2KzMcr9Y=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/39f6c82b112242a0aab6c2aeaeda6ee1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789863&x-signature=y6xbUElgJEdEmavFGcxVaUhewug%3D","user_id":"752538619491374","user_name":"火吹竹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"752538619491374","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7321677937944579134","book_info":{"abstract":"第二人称RPG自由冒险（轻松向）
Loading……
你是一名玩家，不同世界在你眼里就像不同的大副本地图，里面有丰富多彩的小副本冒险等待你的探索。
（非传统第四天灾）（主角本质无性别，为避免混乱固定建女号）（经验值加载中…）
……妖精的尾巴公会：
回忆中，伙伴们的羁绊如同星座的连线，闪闪发亮。
……全职猎人大陆：（运行中…）
念力无限，取之不竭。故事开始冒险。
……歌剧魅影主题：
让阴暗魅影也见识一下冒险向的震撼！
……文豪野犬剧场：
读档大作战，有支线就来。咦，怎么还有空白记忆的存档？

4624958","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有冒险的气息，玩家超级可爱，喜欢冒险，真的很适合猎人世界，虽然大多都是日常，但感觉真的就是原著没有发生的故事，也让我体会到了猎人世界的魅力[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721313019,"group_id":"7321677937944579134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为爱发电，学生党不定时更新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0wit3I9oMBrPHzSozryM+M=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4cc39eb96b644b2a7f9f201c1ebfcd0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788003&x-signature=gTnV41tabSZluEAIik1Ns2uMKQI%3D","user_id":"99224361710","user_name":"浪得几日"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99224361710","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7321677937944579134","book_info":{"abstract":"第二人称RPG自由冒险（轻松向）

nt":{"comment_id":"7381438961858822937","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"综了挺多，目前主体在猎人世界，主角降落地为流星街，通过猎人考试，遇到了监护人岩松（主角名字为浅草•乱花），也陆陆续续遇到很多伙伴，成为一个领袖猎人，组成了一个自由冒险团。成员大概目前有美食猎人的卜哈喇和门淇，新吉，旋律，拜拉达多，（流浪音乐猎人）风斯。美食手艺很好，还遇到过蜘蛛团很多成员，和其中三个是游戏搭子。主体轻松愉快，日常温馨。","text_exts":[{"e":96,"s":92,"text":"美食猎人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E9%A3%9F%E7%8C%8E%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774252886515F04CC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227381438961858822937%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227321677937944579134%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E9%A3%9F%E7%8C%8E%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718627013,"group_id":"7321677937944579134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么都有可能是假的，但乐子一定是真的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Hj/iRFqOEdSr13bKWaOZoC6Lo+tzddd6YlDY2JisdQ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6e097ca0518f44e4a07cc16c09e619ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796546&x-signature=5Shk9RoEP9rFkiJgjrpBPpmzAlo%3D","user_id":"3967506399113452","user_name":"寡默官"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3967506399113452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7321677937944579134","book_info":{"abstract":"第二人称RPG自由冒险（轻松向）
